zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen Butler於1575年8月29日出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾盧申頓時，他的父親James Butler45歲，母親Mary Henry Or Henny39歲。他於1599年12月27日與Sarah Elliott在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1633年3月10日在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德享年57歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen Butler于1575年8月29日出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾盧申頓时，他的父亲James Butler45岁，母亲Mary Henry Or Henny39岁。他于1599年12月27日与Sarah Elliott在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1633年3月10日在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德享年57岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen Butler was born on 29 August 1575, in Rushton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, James Butler, was 45 and his mother, Mary Henry Or Henny, was 39. He married Sarah Elliott on 27 December 1599, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 10 March 1633, in Hartford, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 57, and was buried in Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen Butler est né le 29 août 1575, à Rushton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Butler, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mary Henry Or Henny, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Elliott le 27 décembre 1599, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1633, à Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen Butler am 29. August 1575 in Rushton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Butler 45 und seine Mutter Mary Henry Or Henny 39. Er hat am 27. Dezember 1599 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Sarah Elliott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. März 1633 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen Butlerが1575年8月29日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアルシュトンで生まれた時，父James Butlerは45歳，母Mary Henry Or Hennyは39歳であった。1599年12月27日にイギリスイギリスエセックスでSarah Elliottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1633年3月10日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードで57歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Butler(이)가 1575년 8월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 러슈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Butler(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Henry Or Henny(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1599년 12월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Sarah Elliott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1633년 3월 10일 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen Butler родился 29 августа 1575 г. в местности руштон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени James Butler было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Henry Or Henny, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Elliott 27 декабря 1599 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 марта 1633 г. в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.
